description: Markets, economy, corporate earnings, banking, trade, and financial policy. Owns corporate/financial news of tech companies (layoffs, antitrust, earnings, M&A).
embeddings: Stock market indices S&P 500 Nasdaq Dow Jones close higher or lower on earnings and economic data
Federal Reserve interest rate decision and monetary policy move to control inflation
Quarterly corporate earnings report beating or missing analyst revenue and profit expectations
Central bank raises or cuts benchmark interest rates in response to inflation and growth
Major company announces mass layoffs and restructuring to cut operating costs
Merger and acquisition deal as a corporation acquires a rival in a multibillion-dollar takeover
Initial public offering IPO debut as a company lists its shares on the stock exchange
Inflation rate consumer price index rises or falls squeezing household purchasing power
Monthly jobs report shows the labor market adding or shedding nonfarm payrolls
Global supply chain disruption raises shipping costs and delays manufacturing output
Currency exchange rate as the dollar euro and yen fluctuate on economic data
Import tariffs and duties escalate a trade war hitting corporate margins and markets
Bank collapse or financial institution failure triggers emergency regulatory intervention
Recession fears grow as GDP economic growth contracts for consecutive quarters
Consumer spending and retail sales figures signal shifting economic demand
Treasury bond yields rise or fall as investors price in central bank rate expectations
Hedge fund or private equity firm makes a major leveraged investment or buyout bet
Company files for bankruptcy protection amid mounting debt and quarterly losses
CEO resignation or executive leadership shakeup announced at a major corporation
Commodity prices for gold copper and wheat move on global demand outlook
Antitrust regulators investigate monopoly power or move to block an anticompetitive merger
Dividend payout and stock buyback program announced to reward shareholders
Big technology company quarterly earnings and stock reaction from Apple Google Microsoft or Amazon
Digital advertising market and online ad revenue growth or decline for major platforms
International Monetary Fund IMF or World Bank revises the global economic growth forecast
Wall Street analysts upgrade or downgrade a stock rating and adjust the price target
Wage growth and salary negotiations intensify amid cost of living pressures
Corporate accounting irregularity or earnings restatement disclosed affecting the share price
Enterprise software company acquisition or major SaaS business deal reshaping the market
Business sentiment and consumer confidence survey signals the economic mood
